# t4o_project_quota (Resource)

Sets a per-project T4O backup quota (an `allowed_quota` assignment). Useful for governing tenants as code.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `allowed_value` (Number) Allowed quota value for this type (e.g. number of workloads, bytes).
- `project_id` (String) Project UUID the quota applies to. Changing forces recreation.
- `quota_type_id` (String) Quota-type UUID (from the project's available quota types). Changing forces recreation.

### Optional

- `high_watermark` (Number) Warning threshold; defaults to `allowed_value` when omitted.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Allowed-quota UUID.
